description: Add a new formatter by following the style and export pattern of existing functions.
prompt: Add formatDuration(seconds) using the existing formatter style. It should return values like 1h 01m 01s and be exported from src/index.mjs so the tests pass.

files.README.md:
# Formatters

Existing formatters keep output compact and deterministic. Add new helpers in src/formatters.mjs and export them through src/index.mjs.
